{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-24 08:40 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Hut","CrossCountryDescription":"Fair","CrossCountryGroomed":"Closed"}]},"CrossCountryMaintenance":{"CrossCountryReporterDate":"23 July 2026","CrossCountryComments":"Good morning, Last night it looked like we going to get a freeze but halfway through the fog rolled in and sent the humidity back up which made grooming a little more difficult. But once you walk up to the snowline you will find some good skiing considering the snow level, we have currently. we have groomed all of the inner trails that the conditions will allow for including the Nordic bowl and the aqueduct through to the dam wall. Panorama, the start of the sun valley loop and McKay rd is where you will find the best skiing. we had set classic track on panorama, McKay rd and into sun valley. Get out there and enjoy what skiing we do have ","CrossCountryConditions":"Spring","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"22 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"10","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"9"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"24 July 2026","PatrolTime":"6:15 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"42","PatrolFreshSnow":"3","PatrolVillageBowl":"42","PatrolSunValley":"48","PatrolNorthSide":"32","PatrolLastSnowFall":"24 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"A cool and blustery morning on the upper mountain. The stars are out, we have had a 3cm dusting of fresh snow and the snowmaking guns have been blazing since yesterday, Things have groomed up a treat, and groomed runs will be the pick first thing this morning. Rug up if you are headed out as the temperature is currently minus 4 with a wind chill of minus 12. Ski and ride with care and enjoy!","PatrolForecast":"Cloudy. Areas of frost and the chance of fog near the New South Wales border in the morning. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Snow possible above 1000 metres. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 5 and 12.","PatrolSnowChains":"Must be carried","PatrolRoadConditions":"Road Open: Beware icy patches","PatrolVillageRoadConditions":"Clear of
